calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing To Approve The Compromise Of Two Minors - Celina Lieu & Randy Vong.
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Manuel Sison, Esq. appeared for petitioners Truong Lieu and Thanh T. Duong, who were present as Guardians Ad Litem for for the minors, Celina Lieu and Randy Vong, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioners and the minors were placed under oath and examined.
Norman L. Hallquist, Esq. appeared for defendant Hing Lung Enterprise, Inc.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Celina Lieu:

Settlement Amount - $54,488.00.
Attorney's Fees - $13,622.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $40,866.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 1640 Van Ness Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94109. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

As to Randy Vong:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $4,000.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 940 Florin Road, Sacramento, CA 95831. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Moton ; Joint To Extend Arbitration Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Celina Lieu and Randy Vong's Mmotion to Extend Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is ordered off calendar as moot. Case has settled. Proceedings not reported. (212)
